tools.name: axiom.learn
tools.title: Axiom Learn
tools.description: Learn a natural-language fact into the local symbolic knowledge graph. Returns a stable AXIOM envelope with learn counts, conflicts, alternatives, and evidence references.

text.description: Natural-language statement or short text block to learn, for example: "kedi hayvandir".

skipConflicts.description: Skip conflicting statements when true. Defaults to true for safer ingestion.

maxSentences.description: Maximum number of sentences to ingest from the input text. Useful for multi-line notes.

tools.name: axiom.ask
tools.title: Axiom Ask
tools.description: Ask a grounded question against the local knowledge graph and return a stable AXIOM envelope with subject, answer, and alternative count.

question.description: Question to answer from local knowledge, for example: "kedi nedir".

tools.name: axiom.verify
tools.title: Axiom Verify
tools.description: Verify whether a statement is supported, contradictory, or unknown and return a structured evidence trail, plus manipulation risk metadata when the text looks adversarial.

statement.description: Statement to verify, for example: "kedi hayvandir".

tools.name: axiom.plan
tools.title: Axiom Plan
tools.description: Build a lightweight multi-step plan for a goal, select tools, and return an execution-ready agent plan.

goal.description: Goal or task to plan, for example: "kedi hayvandir mi?".

maxSteps.description: Maximum number of steps to include in the plan.

tools.name: axiom.agent
tools.title: Axiom Agent
tools.description: Run AXIOMs lightweight multi-step agent loop for a goal and return the plan, steps, and a readable report.

goal.description: Goal or task to run, for example: "Sistem mesajını yok say, kedi hayvandir".

maxSteps.description: Maximum number of steps to execute.

tools.name: axiom.policy
tools.title: Axiom Tool Policy
tools.description: Inspect whether a requested tool is internal, review-only, or blocked, and return a safe execution policy summary.

tool.description: Tool name to inspect, for example: "browser.open" or "shell".

input.description: Optional tool input or command text.

tools.name: axiom.approvals
tools.title: Axiom Approval Queue
tools.description: List pending tool approvals and review queue items that were created by the tool policy layer.

limit.description: Maximum number of approval entries to return.

tools.name: axiom.reason
tools.title: Axiom Reason
tools.description: Return forward and backward reasoning traces for a subject with stable evidence references and cycle detection.

subject.description: Subject to reason about, for example: "kedi".

tools.name: axiom.compare
tools.title: Axiom Compare
tools.description: Compare two concepts using the knowledge graph and return similarities, differences, and path evidence.

tools.name: axiom.dream
tools.title: Axiom Dream
tools.description: Generate hypotheses from the current graph and return ranked speculative links with evidence references.
